raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "A KUNGA Rohka bi-
ja us man/ un iſwed-
de mannt zaurt ta KUN-
GA Garru/ un nolikke manni
weenab Eeleijag Widdu/ ta bija
pilla ar Rauleem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch likke manni
wiſsapkahrt tezzen teem pahreet/
un redſi/ tur bija fohti dauds
wirs tahg Eeleijag/un raugi/tee
bija fohti iſkaltufchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija us man:
Tu Zilweka Behrus/ arrig ſchee
Kaulti tapg dſihwi? un eg fazzt-
ju: Kungg KUNGGS/ tu to
fiunt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Wiꞥſch us
man:Sluddina pahr ſcheemRau-
leem/ un fakki us teem: Juhs ta-
kaltuschi Raulti / klaufajt ta
KUNGA Wahrdtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tag Kungg
KUNGGS us ſcheem Rauleem:
Rangt/ Es weddichu to Garru
eekſch juws / un juhs tapfeet
dſihwi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es liſſchu Dſihſtag us
juws / un liſſchu Meeſu pahr
juws nahkt/ un wilſſchu weenu
Ahdu pahr juws / un dohſchu
weenu Garru eekſch juws / un
juhs tapfeet dſihwi/ un fajutti-
feet/ ka es tas KUNGGS eſimu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fluddinaju es ta/ ka
man bija pawehlehts / un tur
tappe weena Braſſchkeschana /
kad es fluddinaju/ un raugi/ tur
bija weena Rustinaschana/ un tee
Kaulti nahze kohpa / Kaults per
fawa Kauta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es redſejn / un ra
Dſihſtag tappc pahr teem /
Meesfa nahze pahr teem /
wixsch wilke weenu Ahdu
teem / bet nekahds Gars
eekſch teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija us ni
Sluddina us to Wehju/ tu
weka Behrns/ fluddina un
us to Wehju : Ta fakka
Kungg KUNGGS: Tu G
nahz no to tſchetru Wehju
fehm/ un puht us teem No
teem/ ka tee dſihwi tohp.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es fluddinaju /
wiꞥſch man bij pawehlejs.
nahze tas Gars eekſch winne
un tee tappc dſihwi/ un sta-
ja us farwahn Kahjahm/ w
tohti leels Puls.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Wiꞥſch
man: Tu Zilweka Behrns/
Kaulti irr wiſs Israäta Na
rangt/ tee fakka: Muhsu K
irr fakaltuschi/ un muhsu Ga
ſchana irr iſnihluſi / un u
effam bohja gahjuſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz fluddina/ un
ki us teem : Ta fakka tag Kli
KUNGGS: Redſ/ Es atw
ſchu juhtu Rappug/ un uewe-
ſhu juhs no juhtu Rappeem/
manni Landis! un weddi
juhs us Israäta Semmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un juhs fajuttifeet/
tas KUNGGS eſmu/ kad es
fu Rappug buhſchu atwehris
juhs no juhſeim Rappeem
weddis/ ak manni Landis!
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es dohſchu fawu �
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
